result: If I could change the world in one way, it would be to instill a universal sense of empathy in every person. Empathy—the ability to truly understand and share the feelings of others—could break down barriers of misunderstanding, reduce conflict, and foster cooperation across cultures, ideologies, and personal differences. It would encourage people to prioritize compassion over division, to listen rather than judge, and to act with kindness even in the face of disagreement. I believe this one shift in human nature could ripple out to address countless issues, from inequality to violence, creating a world where connection and mutual support are the default.
